title: Samsung opens up Galaxy Z Fold8 and Z Flip8 reservations
description: After Samsung confirmed the Galaxy Unpacked date for July 22, the company opened up reservations for the upcoming Galaxy Z Fold8 and Z Flip8 series. As always, you can just register and wait until the actual devices come out before making a final decision on buying a handset. This year, Samsung is more modest with its pre-sale offers. The reservation offer includes a $30 credit that can be used toward accessories and other products at Samsung's official store. That voucher, however, is eligible only at checkout when you decide to purchase some of the upcoming foldables. For comparison,...

title: Huawei Pura 90s series teased with flashy gradient backs
description: Huawei is bringing the Pura 90 series to the global market next week and we got a few new details thanks to a pair of teasers posted on Huawei’s X account. It turns out the devices will be called Pura 90s internationally instead of Pura 90 as they are known in China. Huawei has not detailed what the “S” means, but we can expect to see some spec changes. Huawei showcased the Pura 90s Pro and Pura 90s Pro Max, but it remains to be seen if the Pura 90 (90s) will join them. One thing that won’t change is the flashy gradient color on the Pura 90 Pro Max. Huawei’s teaser...

title: Leaked renders reveal Samsung Galaxy A18's design
description: Samsung is expected to expand its budget Galaxy A-series lineup with the launch of the Galaxy A18 in the coming months. And now, leaked renders have now revealed the phone's design. The renders, shared by Smartphone Checker in collaboration with prolific tipster OnLeaks, are said to be based on CAD files supplied by Samsung to case makers. Based on the leaked images, the Galaxy A18 retains a design that's largely similar to its predecessor. It features a familiar triple rear camera setup, although the camera housing appears to sit more flush with the rear panel. According...

title: Redmi Turbo 6 Max screen and chipset details emerge
description: The Redmi Turbo 5 Max launched in January and now the brand is apparently already working on its successor, the Turbo 6 Max. This isn't coming anytime soon, though, as rumor has it that it's been tentatively scheduled for release in January next year. However, thanks to Digital Chat Station on Weibo, we already know what to expect from the Redmi Turbo 6 Max in terms of its screen and chipset. It will allegedly be powered by a MediaTek Dimensity 9-series SoC, but it's still unclear which one. Redmi Turbo 5 Max The phone will also have a whopping 7-inch display with a "2K"...

title: Huawei is working on a smaller MatePad Pro Max
description: If you like Huawei's MatePad Pro Max but you think it's way too big at 13.2", then you are apparently in luck. According to a new rumor from China, the company is now busy working on what is basically described as a smaller version of this device. It should have the same bells and whistles in a smaller package, making it easier to use and carry around. Unfortunately, the tipster who shared the information has also hinted at a pretty hefty price tag, so if you're looking forward to this one, it might be time to start saving up. Huawei MatePad Pro Max No specs have been revealed yet,...

title: Moto G77 Power unveiled in India with 7,000mAh battery, 6.72" 120Hz LCD and Dimensity 6400
description: Motorola has a number of “G Power” phones available in India, ranging from the Moto G37 Power, through the G57 Power to the G67 Power. Now the company has unveiled the next entry in this list, though it’s more of a mix of the existing models than an upgrade. The Motorola Moto G77 Power boasts a 7,000mAh battery – it’s a defining feature of the G Power series that it shares with its three siblings above. Like them, it supports 30W TurboPower charging and 6W reverse charging. Motorola Moto G77 Power The phone is based on the Dimensity 6400, the same chipset that is used in...

title: iPhone 18 Pro to be thicker than its predecessor
description: When dummy units leaked in April, it was clear that the iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max would be thicker than their predecessors. But then in June a decently reliable tipster claimed that in fact they'd be the exact same 8.75mm thickness as the iPhone 17 Pro and iPhone 17 Pro Max. Except a few days later another source said that the iPhone 18 Pro would be around 2mm thicker than its predecessor. Now the same source is back with basically the same claim, saying that we should expect an increase in thickness of around 2mm. That would take the iPhone 18 Pro over 1cm, which of course isn't...

title: Redmi Note 17 series launch date and design officially revealed
description: Last week, Redmi confirmed that its new Note 17 lineup would debut in China this month. The company has now announced the launch date for the series while also revealing its design and some of its key features. The Redmi Note 17 and Redmi Note 17 Pro are set to launch in China on July 14. Based on the official teaser images, the standard model will feature a single rear camera housed in a squarish camera module. The Redmi Note 17 Pro, meanwhile, appears to sport a dual rear camera setup with a similar camera island. The teaser also showcases the handset in a new "Clear Blue"...

title: vivo T5 Lite 5G launch officially teased, to pack a 6,500mAh battery
description: vivo India has teased the launch of a new T-series smartphone, the vivo T5 Lite 5G, while also revealing its battery capacity and charging capabilities. The company has confirmed that the vivo T5 Lite 5G will arrive in India soon with a 6,500mAh battery and support for 44W wired fast charging. While vivo is yet to reveal the remaining specifications, a leak from last month suggested the handset will feature a 6.74-inch HD+ LCD display with a 120Hz refresh rate. The vivo T5 Lite 5G is also tipped to be powered by the MediaTek Dimensity 6300 SoC and sport a 50MP primary rear...

title: Samsung confirms Galaxy Unpacked event for July 22, wide foldable expected
description: Samsung has officially announced the date for its next Galaxy Unpacked event, where it is expected to unveil the Galaxy Z Fold8, Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra, and Galaxy Z Flip8. In a press release, the company confirmed that Galaxy Unpacked will take place in London, UK, on July 22. Samsung also shared a teaser video featuring the tagline "A New Shape Unfolds," hinting at its upcoming wide foldable, which is expected to debut as the Galaxy Z Fold8. The event will be livestreamed on Samsung's official YouTube channel and website starting at 2 PM BST, 9 AM EDT, and 3 PM CEST. Customers...

title: Google Pixel 11, Pixel 11 Pro, Pixel 11 Pro XL, and Pixel 11 Pro Fold prices leak
description: According to a new report from France, the Pixel 11, Pixel 11 Pro, Pixel 11 Pro XL, and Pixel 11 Pro Fold will be announced on August 11, which is also when pre-orders will start. Google Pixel 11 Pro XL leaked CAD-based renders The devices will be released on August 20. All of them will start at 256GB of storage for the first time ever. Here's the full pricing breakdown for the Eurozone in the table below: Model Storage Price (EUR) Price (GBP) Pixel 11 256 GB €999 £879 Pixel 11 512 GB ...

title: iPhone Air 2 rumored to pack a slightly larger battery
description: Apple is expected to unveil the iPhone Air 2 alongside the iPhone 18 and iPhone 18e in early 2027. While the handset has already been rumored to feature a dual rear camera setup and improved battery life, a new leak now sheds light on its battery capacity. The leak claims the iPhone Air 2 could pack a battery with a capacity of 3,500mAh or more. While that may not seem particularly large by today's standards, it would be an upgrade over the 3,149mAh battery in the original iPhone Air. The iPhone Air 2 is also rumored to feature a 6.55-inch LTPO AMOLED display with a 120Hz refresh...

title: Samsung might start taking pre-reservations for the new Galaxy Z foldables tomorrow
description: Samsung will kick off the pre-reservation campaign for the Galaxy Z Fold8, Z Fold8 Ultra, Z Flip8 and the new Galaxy Watches tomorrow, July 8, claims tipster Abhishek Yadav. This tracks with Samsung’s usual timeline. For example, pre-reservations for the Galaxy S26 series started on February 11, exactly two weeks ahead of the official unveiling on February 25. Samsung has let it slip that the new foldables will be unveiled on July 22, i.e. exactly two weeks after tomorrow. All the Galaxy Z Folds that came before The company just confirmed that the Z Fold8 and Z Fold8 Ultra will...

title: Google officially reveals when it's launching the Pixel 11 series
description: Mere hours ago a rumor claimed Google would, rather fittingly, (considering the naming) be unveiling the Pixel 11 devices on August 11, and it turns out that rumor was wrong - but not by much. Bloomberg’s Mark Gurman has now received an official invite from Google to the grand launch event, and it's taking place on August 12 in New York City at 6 PM local time. Google Pixel event - August 12 pic.twitter.com/Veo1RCJN7j— Mark Gurman (@markgurman) July 7, 2026 That's 3 PM in LA, 11 PM in London, 12 AM on August 13 in Central Europe, 1 AM on August 13 in Eastern Europe, and 3:30 AM on...

title: Motorola starts teasing the Edge 70 Max with magnetic wireless charging
description: Last month, we saw the Motorola Edge 70 Max in some leaked renders, and then the phone got certified by the WPC with support for 25W wireless charging. Today, Motorola has started teasing it in India, ever so subtly, through its official X account. Don't miss the "Max" there. The days are getting busier. Your phone should be getting smarter.Coming soon. pic.twitter.com/ftYnLexyng— Motorola India (@motorolaindia) July 7, 2026 There's also a Flipkart teaser microsite for the device, which features phrases like "max every move", "built to dominate", and "effortlessly fast". That last...

title: Nintendo is giving the Switch 2 a user-replaceable battery
description: It’s been over a year since the Nintendo Switch 2 has been available and Nintendo is making a big change to its most popular console. Starting this autumn, new Switch 2 units sold across all 27 European Union member states as well as Norway, Switzerland, the UK, Saudi Arabia, Oman, the United Arab Emirates and South Africa will feature user-replaceable batteries. Nintendo Switch 2 updated battery specifications Nintendo detailed the hardware update in a dedicated post on its website. The updated Switch 2 is getting a 5,172mAh battery, which is 1% less than the current version’s...

title: Samsung Galaxy A27 review
Apple iPhone 18 Pro and Pro Max's battery details surface in regulatory filings
description: A recent rumor claimed that the Apple iPhone 18 Pro Max's eSIM model will pack a 5,425 mAh battery, while the version with a physical SIM tray will come with a 5,235 mAh battery. We are now looking at new information that paints a slightly different picture. New filings in China's 3C database, spotted by tipster Digital Chat Station and likely referring to the iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max, reveal the battery capacities of both smartphones. Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max The iPhone 18 Pro Max's eSIM model will come with a 5,567 mAh battery, whereas the physical SIM tray model will...

title: US states sue Meta, seeking $1.4 trillion in damages over young user safety
description: Meta, Facebook’s parent company, could be on the hook for $1.4 trillion in penalties. The astronomical sum is the potential damage from an ongoing trial against the company over allegations from several US states that Meta designed its platform to be addictive to young users. California, Colorado, Kentucky and New Jersey are leading the charge with the trial itself being held in Oakland, California in front of US District Judge Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers. The states' filings are kept under wraps for now, but a hearing that took place in June revealed some details. The $1.4 trillion is the...

title: Samsung confirms that the Galaxy Z Fold8 and Z Fold8 Ultra will use a Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5
description: Qualcomm and Samsung posted this on Instagram, confirming that the upcoming Galaxy Z foldables will be powered by the custom Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 for Galaxy. Well, there is an asterisk to that. First, there is no phone visible in the video – just the outline of one. The aspect ratio suggests that this is the Galaxy Z Fold8, aka Z Fold Wide. When opened, this will have a 4:3 display inside. In its closed state, this phone is not as tall and narrow as the Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra (the new name of the classic book-style foldable). You can see the two side by side (in dummy form)...
